title: Beille Stainless Steel Black Knife Set Kitchen Utensils, 5pc
description:
A fantastic, multipurpose black knife set for the home cook or chef, that will stand out in any kitchen! This knife set from Beille includes a chef knife, slicing knife, bread knife, utility knife and paring knife, all of which will easily assist with food and meal prep needs in the kitchen. This matte black knife set is constructed from quality stainless steel, that will ensure optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping, slicing and more. Additionally, the rounded, textured and ergonomically designed handles make for a safe and easy handling experience, while providing an excellent grip. Featuring a sleek matte black finish, the five piece knife set from Beille is not only functional and reliable, but also a stylish and contemporary alternative to standard stainless steel knives

  • WEDDING GIFTS: Whether as a standalone gift or bundled with other kitchen essentials, the 5pc stainless steel knife set from Beille makes a great gift for newlyweds, for college dorm rooms or as a housewarming gift too!

  • SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Black; Material: Stainless Steel; Dimensions: Chef Knife 8.0 inch, Bread Knife 8.25 inch, Utility Knife 4.25 inch, Paring Knife 3.25 inch and Carving Knife 8.0 inch
